mechanism: Under fiscal dominance, real interest rates are held below warranted levels — the strongest driver in multi-factor gold models. Central bank gold buying at 1,000+ tonnes/year is the revealed-preference signal that reserve managers are positioning for fiscal dominance.
regime_dependence: If U.S. credibly consolidates fiscal policy, gold could re-rate $300-500 lower. The attribution of the gold residual to fiscal concerns vs. geopolitics vs. momentum is contested.
